question: What are our slowest-moving products by units sold?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  p.category,
  COUNT(oi.id) AS units_sold
FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p
LEFT JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
  ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY product_name, p.category
ORDER BY units_sold ASC, product_name
LIMIT 10
report: Several catalog products have never sold. This query surfaces 10 items with zero units sold, spanning Blazers & Jackets, Jeans, Accessories, and Dresses - tied-up inventory and prime candidates for markdown, bundling, or delisting. Note the LEFT JOIN from products to order_items: it is required so unsold products, which have no order rows, still appear with a count of zero.
